FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Geopolitical Risks and BOJ Tightening Outlook Pressure the Pair
tldr_points: Middle East escalation fuels safe-haven demand for JPY
OECD BOJ rate forecast to 2% by 2027 supports JPY carry trade unwinding
Risk-off from oil shock scenarios reinforces downside bias
FX.excerpt: Geopolitical tensions and BOJ tightening outlook create bearish structure for USD/JPY
FX.comment: Bearish on geopolitical risks and BOJ tightening outlook

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Nvidia China Catalyst Signals Tech-Led Rally; Support Emerging at MA20
tldr_points: Nvidia CEO Huang's Trump China trip signals strategic tech support, semiconductor sector momentum
Semiconductor leadership spilling into broader S&P 500; risk-on sentiment prevails
MA20 support intact; RSI in bullish territory below overbought threshold
STOCKS.excerpt: Tech catalyst from Nvidia China diplomatic link drives S&P 500 higher; buy on dips toward key support.
STOCKS.comment: Nvidia catalyst provides fundamental catalyst for tech-led upside; buy on dip toward MA20 support

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Adoption Wave Drives Bullish Setup as Technical Levels Approach
tldr_points: JPMorgan's second tokenized MMF on Ethereum signals accelerating institutional crypto allocation
CFTC backing Kalshi validates regulated prediction markets, expanding crypto utility
Technical structure remains constructive; monitor MA20 support for entry
CRYPTO.excerpt: Institutional catalysts align; await pullback to key moving average for tactical long entry.
CRYPTO.comment: Await pullback to MA20 for tactical long entry; institutional catalysts remain strongly bullish
